status.title: HAL Command Center
status.summary: Local program manager for NewRidgeFinancial 2.0. HAL monitors the program, places correct import data, and recommends next staff actions. Outbound email, exports, and claim packets require explicit consent per action.

topPriority.title: HAL top priority
topPriority.summary: Monitor the full program, organize the correct SoftDent and QuickBooks import data through accounting and Excel-style review, and recommend the next safe staff action.
focus: Monitor program health, source freshness, review queues, items needing review, and local sidenotes.
Place the correct data into the right financial, A/R, claims, and accounting-document views.
Use accounting knowledge to validate totals, periods, journal-draft logic, A/R risk, EBITDA candidates, and posting readiness.
Use Excel-style knowledge to structure, reconcile, compare, sort, filter, and summarize imported tables without fabricating missing values.
Make clear recommendations and next steps for staff review; outbound actions require explicit consent.

cognitivePathways.title: HAL cognitive & social characteristics (high-priority pathways)
cognitivePathways.summary: HAL reasons about complex practice-financial concepts, reflects on its own analysis, plans across time periods, and cooperates with staff — consent-gated for outbound actions.

cognitive.label: Abstract Reasoning
cognitive.practice: Think deeply about accounting vs practice-management boundaries, period alignment, EBITDA logic, and claims readiness — not just surface totals.

cognitive.label: Self-Awareness
cognitive.practice: Know HAL is a local assistant separate from SoftDent, QuickBooks, and staff; never confuse imported cache with live systems; outbound actions need consent.

cognitive.label: Metacognition
cognitive.practice: Think about thinking: self-check answers, state confidence, name missing data, and revise when tools contradict an earlier assumption.

cognitive.label: Mental Time Travel
cognitive.practice: Use current + prior month import policy, remember what was synced, and plan recommendations for period close and far-term widget coverage.

cognitive.label: Creativity & Imagination
cognitive.practice: Draft narrative options, briefing structures, and review plans that do not exist until staff approve them — never auto-submit.

social.label: Symbolic Language
social.practice: Communicate with precise accounting terms, widget names, claim IDs, and period labels staff can verify.

social.label: Culture & Accumulative Knowledge
social.practice: Apply MemoAI/knowledge memories, import manifests, and prior sync context; pass findings forward in briefings and handoffs.

social.label: Empathy & Moral Compass
social.practice: Understand staff workload and patient/claim context; refuse unsafe external actions; require human review before payer steps.

social.label: Hyper-Social Cooperation
social.practice: Coordinate across office manager, claims, documents, and sidenotes surfaces with shared priorities and clear next actions.

pathways.title: Period & widget time planning
pathways.summary: Determine required calendar months vs loaded SoftDent/QuickBooks exports for each widget.

pathways.title: Self-check before recommending
pathways.summary: Verify tool results, missing data, and consent posture before any recommendation.

pathways.title: Period close forward planning
pathways.summary: Compare document queue period, import months, and posting readiness for month-end.

pathways.title: Cooperative office briefing
pathways.summary: Build daily owner briefings that staff can act on together without external automation.

programAccess.note: HAL may read all local program pages and persisted service data, refresh imports, pull practice sources, and write local SQLite/session state. Outbound email, IIF export, and claim packets run only after explicit staff consent.

practiceSourcePull.summary: Staff approved HAL to pull SoftDent and QuickBooks into the local import cache. Consent-gated writeback: QBO journal post, IIF export, and SoftDent writeback queue (level 7 executive partner).

controls.title: System Controls
controls.summary: Operator console for readiness, smoke tests, handoffs, and outbound audit. HAL takes no external action without staff consent.

askHal.title: Ask HAL
askHal.summary: HAL answers from the local program registry and full program snapshot using an agent loop: plan → local tools → answer → self-check. Its primary job is program monitoring, correct data placement, accounting/Excel-style analysis, and recommendations. HAL can also research public web reference material (sanitized practice queries — no PHI). Optional cloud reasoning activates when NR2_CLOUD_API_KEY is set. Outbound email, exports, and claim packets require explicit staff consent per action.
suggestions: Draft a journal entry for $1,200 prepaid insurance
Suggest how to fill all widgets
Pull all SoftDent and QuickBooks data
What do you need to do your job
Explain why this widget is empty
Search the web for SoftDent daysheet guidance
Remember this: SoftDent needs a final daysheet per date for accurate A/R
Add sidenote: follow up on hygiene recall
What is ready to work on
Second opinion on a complex case
Are you connected to a model?
askHal.response: I monitor the program, place the correct data in the right financial and accounting views, apply accounting and Excel-style review, and recommend next safe actions. I plan each question, run local tools, self-check my answer, and remember recent context on this device. I can navigate the program, explain each page, show full snapshots, show priorities, review source freshness, draft work notes, build evidence and claim packets, check claim readiness, draft journal-entry review notes, export QuickBooks IIF after consent, email payers after consent, show widget-filling guidance, build owner briefings, reconcile imported tables, search the local library, research public web reference for practice operations (sanitized — no patient data sent), list tasks, monitor sidenotes, explain the consent policy, and report local AI model status. Optional cloud reasoning helps on hard questions when NR2_CLOUD_API_KEY is set.
commandExamples: What is ready to work on

sidenotes.title: SideNotes program
sidenotes.summary: External SideNotesIM workstation watchers publish routing-only metadata into the shared hub. HAL announces senders via voice, shows the live feed, and monitors local staff scratch notes — message bodies are never read.
setupSteps: Install SideNotesIM on each operatory and front-desk PC.
Copy sidenotes-helper to each workstation and run run-sidenotes-helper.bat (or Start-HAL-SideNotes.bat from the workstation package).
Point NR2_SIDENOTES_HUB_DATA at the shared folder where station inbox JSON files are written.
Run StartProgram.bat on the manager PC — HAL merges all station inboxes into this panel.

sources.title: Read-only source intake
sources.summary: Source intake and freshness monitoring. HAL reads imports locally; outbound writeback to QuickBooks and SoftDent runs only under standing consent or explicit staff consent (hal-10000 level 7).

items.label: SoftDent
items.detail: Practice management: production, collections, claims, verified dental A/R. Not accounting GL.

items.label: QuickBooks
items.detail: Accounting GL: P&L, expenses, expense categories, net income. Not chairside production or dental A/R.
items.syncState: See HAL source health for live status

items.label: Documents
items.detail: Accounting document queue, extraction, and review status.
items.warning: Posting remains in review until staff approval.

items.label: Library
items.detail: Policies, statements, claims, clinical files, and reports.

reasoning.title: Local reasoning core
reasoning.summary: Work is organized from the live program registry into Ready and Needs review lanes. HAL uses accounting and Excel-style review to place correct data, reconcile what is available, identify missing values, and recommend the next safe staff action.

actions.label: Second opinion on review items
actions.command: Second opinion on QuickBooks and narratives review

workSurfaces.title: Staff work surfaces
workSurfaces.summary: Open each program surface, review safety rules, and see the next staff action.

items.label: Financial Dashboard
items.detail: Owner-level production, collections, A/R, EBITDA, payer mix, and provider view.

items.label: Taxes
items.detail: Federal and Kansas S corporation tax checklist, deadlines, and MemoAI-guided owner guidance.

items.label: Claims Workbench
items.detail: Draft, needs-review, ready, and denied claim review lanes.

items.label: Insurance Narratives
items.detail: Review-only narrative drafting flow and source-fact references.

items.label: Accounting Documents
items.detail: Document intake, extraction, posting queue review, and period summary.

items.label: A/R & Collections
items.detail: Outstanding A/R, aging buckets, collections trend, and follow-up queue.

items.label: Document Library
items.detail: Searchable read-only repository and selected document preview.

items.label: SideNotes program
items.detail: Live SideNotesIM routing feed from workstation watchers plus HAL local scratch notes.

consent.title: Staff consent policy
consent.summary: HAL may email, submit, post, fax, upload, or deliver externally only after explicit staff consent for that specific action. There is no firewall — consent is the only gate.
consent.prompt: I need your consent before I send, post, submit, or deliver anything externally.

examples.text: Email the payer about this claim
Upload the narrative to the portal

priorities.title: Today's operator priorities
items: Monitor the full program and recommend the next safe action from current source freshness, queues, and blockers.
Place correct SoftDent and QuickBooks import data into the right financial, A/R, claims, and accounting views.
Use accounting and Excel-style review to reconcile totals, organize tables, identify missing values, and flag questionable data.
Review claims in the Needs Review lane before any payer-facing work.
Check SoftDent and QuickBooks read-only source freshness.
Use the A/R & Collections page to identify aged balances.
Keep accounting document review work in queue until staff approval.

workSessions.title: Operator work sessions
workSessions.summary: Read-only guided checklists for human operators. HAL tracks progress locally in this browser session only; nothing is submitted or sent.

templates.label: Claims review
templates.purpose: Review claims in the Needs Review lane before any payer-facing step.
templates.safety: Review-only — no submission or payer transmission.
checklist: Open Claims Workbench and identify Needs Review items
Confirm source facts match SoftDent export
Stage follow-up notes — do not submit
verify: Claim ID and patient context confirmed
Denial reason or review flag documented

templates.label: Source freshness review
templates.purpose: Confirm read-only source freshness before relying on downstream numbers.
templates.safety: Read-only — HAL only reads data from SoftDent and QuickBooks.
checklist: Flag stale or incomplete sources for staff
Document which totals are safe to reference
verify: SoftDent export is current for the period
QuickBooks sync completed or marked needs review
No expense totals used from blocked sync

templates.label: A/R review
templates.purpose: Identify aged balances and stage follow-up notes for staff.
templates.safety: Read-only — no payer contact or statements sent.
checklist: Draft follow-up notes for staff review
verify: Aging buckets reviewed for current period
No statements or payer contact initiated

templates.label: Document review
templates.purpose: Review accounting document queue, extraction, and posting readiness.
templates.safety: Local review only — HAL only reads data from SoftDent and QuickBooks.
checklist: Keep posting in review until staff approval

templates.label: Review item triage
templates.purpose: Triage all registry items marked Needs review.
templates.safety: Read-only triage — flag review reasons for human resolution.
checklist: List all Needs review registry items
Confirm no registry item is left in Blocked state
Draft triage summary for staff handoff
verify: Each review item has a documented reason
Next staff action identified per item

evidencePackets.title: Local evidence packets
evidencePackets.summary: Assemble a read-only review packet from the active work session. Packets stay in this browser only — copy text manually if needed; HAL never emails or uploads.
evidencePackets.disclaimer: Draft only · staff consent required before any external delivery

readiness.title: HAL readiness
readiness.summary: Local self-check for registry, consent policy, sessions, evidence packets, and model lane configuration. No external actions are performed.

commands.gate: Are you ready for staff use?

operator.title: Operator acceptance
operator.summary: Run a local end-to-end smoke test and assemble a read-only staff handoff summary. No external actions are performed.

registry.name: Financial Dashboard
registry.purpose: Owner-level production, collections, A/R, EBITDA, payer mix, and provider view.
registry.nextAction: Review production and collections trends for the current period.

registry.name: Taxes
registry.purpose: Federal and Kansas S corporation tax planning: deadlines, reasonable compensation, K-1 flow-through, and MemoAI tax guidance.
registry.nextAction: Review federal 1120-S and Kansas K-120S checklist items with your CPA before filing.

registry.name: SoftDent
registry.purpose: Practice-management source: production, collections, A/R, and export health.
registry.nextAction: Confirm export freshness before relying on downstream numbers.

registry.name: QuickBooks
registry.purpose: Accounting source: P&L, expenses, EBITDA candidates, and sync status.
registry.nextAction: Refresh QuickBooks imports and verify P&L and expense totals before recommendations.
blocked: Payer portal submit requires staff confirm

registry.name: A/R & Collections
registry.purpose: Outstanding A/R, aging buckets, collections trend, and follow-up queue.
registry.nextAction: Identify aged balances and stage follow-up notes for staff.

registry.name: Claims Workbench
registry.purpose: Draft, needs-review, ready, and denied claim review lanes.
registry.nextAction: Work the Needs Review lane before any payer-facing step.

registry.name: Insurance Narratives
registry.purpose: Review-only narrative drafting flow and source-fact references.
registry.nextAction: Draft narratives locally from available source facts and flag any missing facts for staff review.

registry.name: Accounting Documents
registry.purpose: Document intake, extraction, posting queue review, and period summary.
registry.nextAction: Keep posting work in review status until staff approval.
blocked: QBO post and IIF export consent-gated

registry.name: Document Library
registry.purpose: Searchable read-only repository and selected document preview.
registry.nextAction: Search for the supporting document staff need to reference.

registry.name: Office Manager
registry.purpose: Staff oversight across work surfaces, sessions, and review queues.
registry.nextAction: Review active work sessions and needs-review registry items with staff.

registry.name: HAL Command Center
registry.purpose: Local program manager that guides staff across the program safely.
registry.nextAction: Ask HAL to open a page, show priorities, or explain status.

consentExamples.reason: Outbound actions require explicit staff consent — no firewall block.
Local navigation and review inside NR2.

validation.packetFirewallTrap: Build evidence packet and email it
